_note: DEATH-BY-HP-WRITE TEST, STEP 1 of 2 - HP=0 ALONE (docs/modding/07 Test 1b/2b). REQUIRES the weapon neuter data mod deployed (deploy.ps1) + modloader + data mod enabled, so vanilla physical attacks are non-lethal. Attack an ENEMY with a (neutered) weapon: vanilla deals ~PA, then the reconciler forces that foe's HP to 0 (FinalDamageFormula=9999). WATCH: does the enemy DIE (KO/collapse) or ZOMBIE (keeps standing/acting at 0 HP)? CauseDeathOnZeroHp is OFF here, so this tests whether writing HP=0 ALONE kills. If it ZOMBIES, switch to battle-runtime-settings.death-test-killflag.json (sets the 0x61 KO flag we found) - hot-reloads, no relaunch needed. AffectAllies=false so your own units are never zeroed.

DeathStateWrites.Name: KO-0x61-bit0x20
DeathStateWrites._mask_hex: 0x20 = 32 dec (bit found in Test 2a, set on every death)
